task_description: Add dark mode toggle to the Angular frontend (apps/web). Create a ThemeService, add a toggle button to the app header, define CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and update all component styles to use the variables.

verification.summary: Build and lint pass after review fixes. No test runner is configured in this project (unitTestRunner: none). No Dockerfile for the web app.

review_fixes.details: 1. Added --rm-danger-surface CSS variable (light: #fdeaea, dark: #3d2626) to :root and :root.dark in styles.scss. Updated .btn-remove in recipe-form.component.ts to use var(--rm-danger-surface). 2. Updated ThemeService to check window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)') when localStorage has no stored value.
